title: Kings Dragons of Berk
description:
Embark on an epic adventure in a sprawling fantasy world filled with mystery, danger, and untamed power.

This modpack is all about dragons, raising them, fighting them, riding them, and uncovering the ancient secrets they guard.
body:
Embark on an epic adventure in a sprawling fantasy world filled with mystery, danger, and untamed power.

This modpack is all about dragons, raising them, fighting them, riding them, and uncovering the ancient secrets they guard. Explore vast biomes teeming with life, loot hidden structures, and venture into dangerous dungeons as you carve your own path through a land shaped by fire and legend.

Set sail on fully functional, realistic ships, command mighty vessels, and traverse treacherous oceans ruled by fearsome pirates. Whether you’re hunting for treasure, battling enemy crews, or discovering forgotten islands, every voyage offers new stories.

Forge alliances, build your stronghold, or wander as a lone adventurer, your journey is yours to write. With endless exploration, massive boss encounters, deep progression, and a world bursting with fantasy, this modpack delivers the ultimate dragon-filled adventure.

 

Master the skies. Rule the seas. Shape your legend.


credits:I do not own these mods, this is a modpack put together with mods made by other creators.
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trade-cycling 
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/easy-npc
